meaning: n.(北欧神话) 巨人始祖(诸神用其遗体创造世界)
examples: Thee nefarious Loki and frost giant, Ymir, are on a quest to steal Santa's powers.
The nefarious Loki and frost giant, Ymir, are on a quest to steal Santa "s powers."
In order to protect it and its inhabits from the giants, Odin and his brother surrounded the earth with a fence made from the eyebrows of the Ymir.
